name: pagemd
description: Convert any web page to Markdown

scripts.build:css: npx @tailwindcss/cli -i src/styles/globals.css -o dist/debug/sidepanel/styles.css && cp dist/debug/sidepanel/styles.css dist/debug/options/styles.css && cp dist/debug/sidepanel/styles.css dist/release/chrome/sidepanel/styles.css 2>/dev/null; cp dist/debug/sidepanel/styles.css dist/release/chrome/options/styles.css 2>/dev/null; true
